content.en:
"Even the Ice Rain God General has admitted defeat, is it possible that Xiao Yue has a chance to win the championship?"

Countless True Monarchs thought in their hearts.

At present, there are only two divine generals who can really pose a threat to Xiao Yue, that is, the reincarnation divine general and the Baohai divine general.

In other words, the gods who really have the strength to win the championship are Xiao Yue, the reincarnation gods and the Baohai gods, all three of them are all victorious, but it is not easy to say who can win.

After a few more moments, the real finale began.

The god of the sea and the god of reincarnation will be the first to face off, and this battle will also determine which of the two can have the hope of becoming the champion.

Many people are optimistic about the Baohai Divine General, because the means of the Baohai Divine General are too unsolvable, and even the Desolate Divine General who breaks through ten thousand laws with one punch cannot get rid of the suppression of the Baohai Divine General.

If you can't get rid of the repression, no matter how strong your strength is, you will be exhausted and admit defeat.

In the ring.

The Treasure Sea God and the Reincarnation God will start fighting.

From the very beginning, the Baohai Divine General used the power of the lake and the sea to suppress the reincarnation gods, and even blocked the void from which the reincarnation gods fled, so that the reincarnation gods would always be suppressed.

According to the plan of the Baohai Divine General, the power of the reincarnation divine general has been exhausted in this way.

However.

At this moment, the reincarnation god summoned six portals.

The seemingly endless power of the lake and sea actually poured into the six portals and disappeared, weakening the suppression of the reincarnation god generals many times at once.

"That's ...... Six Paths of Reincarnation!"

Countless True Monarchs were shocked, and even Ye Tian showed a slight look of shock.

Because the Six Paths of Reincarnation Technique is the second highest Celestial Divine Power in the Chaos Divine Power List, once the Six Paths of Reincarnation Technique is cast, the Six Paths of Reincarnation Gate can be constructed, and all attacks can be dissolved.

Moreover, once it is swallowed up by the six reincarnation gates, the consciousness will fall into reincarnation.

It is rumored that once the Six Paths of Reincarnation Technique is cultivated to the extreme level, it can even forcibly send people into reincarnation, but the cost of sending a strong person into reincarnation is relatively large.

But this method is too rebellious, equivalent to countless reincarnation seeds!

When Ye Tian obtained a reincarnation seed, he also gambled with the disciples of the transcendent forces, so he obtained one, but in other cases, even many Dao weapons could not exchange a reincarnation seed.

It is conceivable how popular a strong person who knows the Six Realms of Reincarnation is to be, and there will definitely be many people who ask the other party to send their low-talent juniors to the Six Realms of Reincarnation.

Countless people want to practice the Six Paths of Reincarnation, but they can't obtain the inheritance of the Six Paths of Reincarnation.

After all, there are too few people who can cultivate the Six Paths of Reincarnation to the realm of Dacheng or Consummation, so it is very difficult to create the inheritance of the Six Paths of Reincarnation, plus the cultivation requirements are too harsh.

The Six Paths of Reincarnation requires a total of four talents: Reincarnation Talent, Reincarnation Talent, Time Talent, and Space Talent, thus forming a new Six Paths of Reincarnation Talent.

If you rely on yourself, you can't form the six reincarnation talents at all, you have to use treasures, and the only treasure that is known to assist in the fusion of the four great talents is the six reincarnation stones.

But almost no one had heard of the Six Reincarnation Stones, and only the Dao Ancestors knew a little bit of information.

"Six reincarnation stones, I didn't expect the reincarnation god general to have such a treasure, it must have been given to him by the Forbidden Palace, otherwise it would be impossible to get it with his strength!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Others may not know where the Six Reincarnation Stones are, but he knows that even the Black Wind Mountain Classic Space has a record.

The Six Dao Reincarnation Stones only appear in the Dark Forbidden Domain, even in the Divine Heaven Realm, the Six Dao Reincarnation Stones are also very rare treasures, and even the top Dao weapons are difficult to exchange for a Six Reincarnation Stones.

Perhaps most of Ye Tian's divine powers in their realm were far inferior to those in the Divine Heaven Realm, but even if they were placed in the Divine Heaven Realm, the top three divine powers on the Chaos Divine Power List were enough to be treated as supreme chaotic divine powers.

After all, the Chaos Divine Power involving four talents, how could it be ordinary!

"It's a pity that I can't obtain the inheritance of the Six Paths of Reincarnation Technique, otherwise I don't need the Six Paths of Reincarnation Stone, and I can also practice it!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Although he is now a true monarch, the Chaos Divine Power is not powerful enough for him, but the Chaos Divine Power of the Six Paths of Reincarnation Technique is even more powerful than some medium-grade Origin Divine Powers.

Coupled with the particularity of the Six Paths of Reincarnation, it is important not to have the highest grade origin supernatural powers.

What's more, if Ye Tianruo has practiced the Six Paths of Reincarnation Technique, he can completely create a Origin Divine Power involving the Six Realms of Reincarnation based on the Six Realms of Reincarnation Technique, and even in the future, he can create his own Dao Technique involving the Six Realms of Reincarnation.

"The Forbidden Hall must have the inheritance of the six reincarnation techniques, if it is possible, it will definitely be exchanged at all costs in the future!"

Ye Tian decided.

At this time.

As soon as the Six Reincarnation Techniques came out, the Treasure Sea God was completely flustered with a calm expression that had not changed for hundreds of millions of years.

Rumble!!!

The six reincarnation gates were suppressed, and the terrifying power of reincarnation pulled the Baohai Divine General.

Once it is pulled in, it will be difficult for the treasure sea god to block the power of reincarnation, and the consciousness will fall into reincarnation, and the body will be slaughtered.

Immediately, the treasure sea god will explode a door hole card in an attempt to break the six reincarnation techniques.

I saw that after a while, the Treasure Sea God would consume a lot, especially the invisible confrontation between the Divine Soul and the Six Reincarnation Gates, so the Divine Soul was a little weak.

But the reincarnation god general is not comfortable, the level of the six reincarnation techniques is too high, and he uses this chaotic magic power, the consumption is very large, and he can't fight for a long time.

Both are going all out, and whoever wins will depend on who can hold on longer.

Another half hour passed.

Suddenly, the Treasure Sea God General sighed and said, "I admit defeat!"

He couldn't hold on, if he was really pulled into it by the six reincarnation gates, once he fell into reincarnation, his soul would inevitably be severely damaged, which would be detrimental to the subsequent game.

Even if he loses to the reincarnation god general, he doesn't want to lose the opportunity to hit the second, anyway, as long as he defeats Xiao Yue, it is still possible to get the second, but once he is hit hard, he can only fight for the third.

Seeing that the treasure sea god will admit defeat, the reincarnation god general is also relieved.

He consumes too much, and he can't hold on for long, and Bao Haishen will admit defeat, which is undoubtedly the best result.

Subsequently, a game was played, and it was finally Xiao Yue's turn to fight against the Baohai God General.

Xiao Yue can only have a chance to compete with the reincarnation god general for the first place only by defeating the Baohai God General.

When Xiao Yue and Baohai God were about to enter the ring, Long Hai Zhenjun glanced at his junior brother Ye Tian, and found that the other party was very calm, and he didn't seem to be worried about anything, so he immediately knew it.

The Baohai God General is still the same as before, trying to suppress Xiao Yue with the power of the lake and the sea.

But Xiao Yue did not cast the Eternal Spear and other attack-type Chaos Divine Powers, but she did cast the Polar Moon Holy Body.

It's just surprising that Xiao Yue didn't cast the Yin Holy Sword.

Because Xiao Yue knew very well that under the other party's lake and sea divine power that blocked the void and suppressed everything, it would be difficult for the Zhiyin Holy Sword to completely inflict heavy damage on the other party.

Therefore, Xiao Yue used another trick-

Airplanes!!!

I saw that a blood-red eye suddenly appeared in the full moon behind Xiao Yue.

In an instant, the blood-red eyes kept spinning, and a terrifying divine soul power spread to the body of the Baohai God General.

The world of illusion is formed in an instant!

At this moment, many Dao Ancestors changed color.

They recognized it!

"The Second Illusion Divine Power of the Divine Heaven Realm - Endless Destruction!"

A Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor said with a slight surprise.
